'''鈭歳-k-s''' ('''sharokasoro''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rain|rain]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rain|rain]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-k-s
|-
! Lemma
| sharokasoro
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirakas|thirakas]] || [[word:jirakas|jirakas]] || [[word:shirakas|shirakas]] || [[word:kirakas|kirakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurakas|thuthurakas]] || [[word:jujurakas|jujurakas]] || [[word:shushurakas|shushurakas]] || [[word:kukurakas|kukurakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurakas|thurakas]] || [[word:jurakas|jurakas]] || [[word:shurakas|shurakas]] || [[word:kurakas|kurakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurakas|thurakas]] || [[word:jurakas|jurakas]] || [[word:shurakas|shurakas]] || [[word:kurakas|kurakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therakas|therakas]] || [[word:jerakas|jerakas]] || [[word:sherakas|sherakas]] || [[word:kerakas|kerakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorakas|thothorakas]] || [[word:jojorakas|jojorakas]] || [[word:shoshorakas|shoshorakas]] || [[word:kokorakas|kokorakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorakas|thorakas]] || [[word:jorakas|jorakas]] || [[word:shorakas|shorakas]] || [[word:korakas|korakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorakas|thorakas]] || [[word:jorakas|jorakas]] || [[word:shorakas|shorakas]] || [[word:korakas|korakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rakas|th忙rakas]] || [[word:j忙rakas|j忙rakas]] || [[word:sh忙rakas|sh忙rakas]] || [[word:k忙rakas|k忙rakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharakas|thatharakas]] || [[word:jajarakas|jajarakas]] || [[word:shasharakas|shasharakas]] || [[word:kakarakas|kakarakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharakas|tharakas]] || [[word:jarakas|jarakas]] || [[word:sharakas|sharakas]] || [[word:karakas|karakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharakas|tharakas]] || [[word:jarakas|jarakas]] || [[word:sharakas|sharakas]] || [[word:karakas|karakas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharakas|sharakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharakas|gosharakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharakas|gokisharakas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharakasn眉|sharakasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharakasnkn眉|gosharakasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakasn眉|gokisharakasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharakash毛|sharakash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharakasnksh毛|gosharakasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharakash毛|gokisharakash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakasro|sharakasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakasnkro|gosharakasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakasro|gokisharakasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakasmu|sharakasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakasnkmu|gosharakasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakasmu|gokisharakasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharakasher|sharakasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharakasnksher|gosharakasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharakasher|gokisharakasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharakasng|sharakasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharakasnkng|gosharakasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharakasng|gokisharakasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharakasya|sharakasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharakasnkya|gosharakasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharakasya|gokisharakasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharakasyam|sharakasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharakasnkyam|gosharakasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharakasyam|gokisharakasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakasn眉sh毛|sharakasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakasnkn眉sh毛|gosharakasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakasn眉sh毛|gokisharakasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakasn眉ro|sharakasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakasnkn眉ro|gosharakasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakasn眉ro|gokisharakasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakasn眉mu|sharakasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakasnkn眉mu|gosharakasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakasn眉mu|gokisharakasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakash毛n眉|sharakash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakasnksh毛n眉|gosharakasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakash毛n眉|gokisharakash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakash毛ro|sharakash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakasnksh毛ro|gosharakasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakash毛ro|gokisharakash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakash毛mu|sharakash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakasnksh毛mu|gosharakasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakash毛mu|gokisharakash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakasron眉|sharakasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakasnkron眉|gosharakasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakasron眉|gokisharakasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakasrosh毛|sharakasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakasnkrosh毛|gosharakasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakasrosh毛|gokisharakasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharakasromu|sharakasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharakasnkromu|gosharakasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharakasromu|gokisharakasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharakasmun眉|sharakasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharakasnkmun眉|gosharakasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharakasmun眉|gokisharakasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharakasmush毛|sharakasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharakasnkmush毛|gosharakasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharakasmush毛|gokisharakasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharakasmuro|sharakasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharakasnkmuro|gosharakasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharakasmuro|gokisharakasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
